projects.title: Production Management System
projects.description: A comprehensive production dashboard connected to a BigQuery database, providing end-to-end product traceability from manufacturing through quality assurance. The system enables real-time monitoring, data management, and analytics for internal operations.
projects.longDescription:
This system is a web-based production dashboard developed using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the frontend, with Python as the backend. It is integrated with a BigQuery database to manage and monitor product information throughout the entire production lifecycle.

The dashboard provides real-time updates and supports essential CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations for production data management. It includes a role-based access control system that allows administrators to configure user permissions and access levels according to organizational requirements.

In addition, the system offers analytics and monitoring capabilities for operational insights, enabling upper management to track production performance and quality metrics effectively. The dashboard is deployed on a Raspberry Pi and is currently used internally within the organization.

projects.title: Inventory Management System
projects.description: A full-featured inventory management system with real-time stock tracking, purchase order management, supplier management, and automated reorder notifications.
projects.longDescription: Developed for a mid-sized retail operation, this system replaced manual spreadsheet tracking with a centralized web application. Stock levels are tracked across multiple warehouse locations, supplier relationships are managed centrally, and automated purchase orders are triggered when stock falls below defined thresholds. The dashboard provides clear KPI metrics and exportable reports.

projects.title: Production Tracking System
projects.description: An IoT platform collecting, storing, and visualizing data from distributed Raspberry Pi sensor nodes, providing real-time environmental monitoring and automated alerts.
projects.longDescription: Designed for facility management, this platform connects multiple Raspberry Pi sensor nodes to a central web dashboard. Each node monitors temperature, humidity, and power consumption. The system provides real-time visualization, historical analysis, and automated threshold-based notifications via email and Telegram. WebSocket connections ensure the dashboard reflects live sensor data without page refreshes.
features: Multi-node sensor data collection via MQTT

projects.title: Smart Surau Occupancy Monitoring System
projects.description: An IoT-based surau occupancy monitoring system powered by Raspberry Pi 5 and Arduino, utilizing ultrasonic sensors to detect occupancy status and provide real-time updates through a web dashboard.
projects.longDescription:
Developed an IoT-based surau occupancy monitoring system using Raspberry Pi 5, Arduino, and ultrasonic sensors to provide real-time visibility of surau usage. The system detects the presence of occupants and allows users to indicate male or female occupancy status through dedicated controls.

Raspberry Pi 5 serves as the central controller, processing occupancy data and synchronizing status updates with a web-based dashboard. To ensure accurate information, the system automatically resets occupancy indicators when no presence is detected for a predefined duration, preventing outdated status information from being displayed.

The solution enables users to remotely check surau availability and occupancy status in real time through a centralized monitoring platform.

projects.title: AI Production Monitoring Dashboard
projects.description: Developed an industrial web-based dashboard integrated with an AI object detection system for real-time production item counting and monitoring.
projects.longDescription:
This project is a web-based production monitoring dashboard integrated with an AI-powered object detection and counting system. The system automatically detects and counts items from camera feeds in real time, reducing the need for manual counting processes.

The dashboard provides a centralized platform for users to monitor production counts, view live updates, and access historical counting records. Production data is collected and displayed through an intuitive interface, allowing operators and supervisors to track production activities efficiently.

Developed using modern web technologies with a Python backend, the system enables real-time visibility of production output and supports better operational monitoring through automated data collection and reporting.

projects.title: Car Workshop Management System
projects.description: Developed a web-based workshop management system developed for an automotive service company in Qatar, enabling efficient management of work orders, customer records, vehicle servicing, and operational workflows.

projects.title: AI Workplace Safety Monitoring System
projects.description: An AI-powered workplace safety monitoring system integrated with a web-based dashboard for real-time detection, monitoring, and management of safety compliance in industrial environments.

projects.title: Data Integration & Management Tool
projects.description: A custom-built data integration tool that enables users to connect, filter, and visualize data from multiple database tables through an interactive drag-and-drop interface.
